title: slideotter
summary: A local browser studio for structured decks, live review, guarded generation, materials, validation, and archived output.
note: The project turns deck work into a tight loop: plan, edit, attach, compare, apply, validate, archive.

cards.title: Structured source
cards.body: Slides, context, materials, and state stay inspectable in the project tree.

cards.title: Live workbench
cards.body: Preview, selector, spec editing, variants, planning, and checks share one browser loop.

cards.title: Guarded output
cards.body: Generated changes stay reviewable until the author applies and validates them.
